mapper.insert: INSERT INTO homework_file ( type, homework_code, submission_code, file_id ) VALUES ( #{type}, #{homework_code}, #{submission_code}, #{file_id} )
INSERT INTO file ( name, logical_path, physical_path, size ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{logical_path}, #{physical_path}, #{size} )
mapper.select: SELECT hf.file_id, f.name AS file_name, f.logical_path AS logical_path, f.physical_path AS physical_path, f.size AS file_size, f.type AS file_type FROM homework_file hf JOIN file f ON hf.file_id = f.file_id WHERE hf.homework_code = #{homework_code}
SELECT file_id FROM homework_file WHERE homework_code = #{homework_code} AND type = 'HOMEWORK'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM homework_file WHERE homework_code = #{homework_code} AND type = 'HOMEWORK'
SELECT name, physical_path, logical_path, size, type FROM file WHERE file_id = #{file_id}
